meanings.definition: put to the test, as for its quality, or give experimental use to
examples: This approach has been tried with good results

meanings.definition: test or examine for the presence of disease or infection
examples: screen the blood for the HIV virus
The teacher tests us every week
We got quizzed on French irregular verbs

meanings.definition: show a certain characteristic when tested
achieve a certain score or rating on a test
examples: She tested high on the LSAT and was admitted to all the good law schools

meanings.definition: determine the presence or properties of (a substance)
tested and proved useful or correct
tested and proved to be reliable
